objective: Validate the current ngrok-backed Lariel chat endpoint end-to-end and produce a result bundle for Main review
required_validation: Confirm current ngrok public /health returns HTTP 200
Confirm current ngrok public /api/chat returns HTTP 200 with JSON answer
Capture the exact ngrok public HTTPS URL used
execution_instructions: Do not edit files in this task
Use the currently active ngrok tunnel if one is already running
If ngrok is not running, start it against port 8091 and record the URL
commands_expected: curl -i -X POST https://CURRENT-NGROK-URL/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"What services does Lariel Systems offer?"}'
